name: establish_defensive_position
description: Move to a safe defensive position with good visibility and ready to engage threats
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("X coordinate for the defensive spot"), y: z.number().optional().describe("Y coordinate for the defensive spot (defaults to current sea level or bot height)"), z: z.number().describe("Z coordinate for the defensive spot"), radius: z.number().default(2).describe("Minimum distance from the point to consider arrived") })
